title: A. O. Smith (AOS) Q3 Earnings Meet, Decline Y/Y on Lower Sales
text: A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q3 results are hurt by lower residential water heater volumes and weak demand in China.

title: A.O. Smith (AOS) Q3 Earnings Match Estimates
text: A.O. Smith (AOS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 0.01%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Ready to Buy the Dip? This Industrial Stock Is a Smart Buy
text: A. O. Smith warned investors that Q3 would be bad and its shares sold off. Now could be a good time to buy.

title: Will Low Water Heater Demand Mar A. O. Smith (AOS) Q3 Earnings?
text: A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q3 performance is likely to have been hurt by weakness in North American residential water heater demand and high raw material costs.

title: This Dividend King Looks Deeply Undervalued
text: According to the GuruFocus sector performance chart, the Industrial sector has fallen more than 23% since the start of the year, which is even worse than the return for the S&P 500 Index.

title: A. O. Smith (AOS) Cuts '22 View on Water Heater Volume Softness
text: A. O. Smith (AOS) slashes its earnings and revenue forecast for 2022 due to expectations of continued softness in North American residential water heater volumes.

title: 7 Under the Radar Dividend Growth Stocks With Upside Potential
text: With volatile markets, investors may want to focus their attention on under the radar dividend growth stocks. These are companies that growth revenue and, or profits at a faster rate than the broader market.

title: AZZ's Q2 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: AZZ's fiscal second-quarter earnings and revenues are lower than expectations. The company completes the divestiture of its Infrastructure Solutions segment.

title: A.O. Smith issues profit warning on soft residential volumes
text: A. O. Smith Corp. AOS, -0.37% shares fell 6.4% in premarket trades on Thursday after the water heater maker lowered its sales and profit targets in the face of softness in North America industry volume. The Milwaukee company now expects adjusted third-quarter profit of 69 cents a share and sales of $874 million.

title: A. O. Smith to Hold Third Quarter Conference Call on October 27, 2022
text: MILWAUKEE , Oct. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE: AOS) will release its third quarter 2022 financial results before the market opens on Thursday, October 27, and has scheduled an investor conference call to follow at 10:00 a.m.
